currentSprint.name: Sprint 14
goals: Finalize unit test coverage for all generators

completed.item: Implemented progress generator with sprint tracking
Added change detection to avoid unnecessary file writes
Fixed timezone handling in date utilities
Created template system with placeholder substitution
Implemented log rotation for activity logs
Added validator utility for config and templates

nextPriorities: Add end-to-end test for full generation pipeline
Optimize file I/O for large repositories
Design plugin API for custom generators

blockers.description: GitHub Actions rate limiting may affect scheduled runs during peak hours
blockers.workaround: Implement exponential backoff in push operations
